main_page.title: Technology Investment
main_page.summary: MTDC manages development and investment funds from early to growth stage for Malaysian SMEs/startups, with focus on six sectors including E&E/semiconductor, 4IR, healthcare/life sciences, food security, green economy, and aerospace/mobility.

commercial_funds.name: Business Growth Fund (BGF)
commercial_funds.introduction: Supports growth-stage technology companies to expand production capacity, market penetration, and corporate governance readiness.
basic_eligibility: Technology-based company with at least 51% Malaysian ownership
Revenue exceeded RM1.5 million and not in loss position
commercial_funds.funding_instrument: Equity funding via Redeemable Convertible Preference Shares (RCPS)
commercial_funds.application_hint: Pitch for funds via MTDC registration

commercial_funds.name: Business Start-Up Fund (BSF)
commercial_funds.introduction: Early-stage financing for technology-based companies using a mix of loan/equity-style instruments to remove growth barriers.
basic_eligibility: Technology-based company with at least 51% Malaysian ownership
commercial_funds.funding_quantum: Up to RM5 million or 90% of total project cost (whichever is lower)
commercial_funds.funding_period: 18 months grace period and 5 years repayment period
commercial_funds.funding_instrument: Interest-free Convertible Promissory Notes (CPN) and/or Preference Shares; CPN may convert to RCPS
commercial_funds.application_hint: Pitch to MTDC via registration page

commercial_funds.name: MTDC-pitchIN Equity Crowdfunding
commercial_funds.introduction: ECF programme to facilitate fundraising for local technology companies through the pitchIN platform.
basic_eligibility: Qualified to launch campaign through pitchIN
commercial_funds.participation_amount: Up to 30% of fund to be raised or maximum RM0.9 million per campaign
commercial_funds.application_hint: Pitch to MTDC / qualify through pitchIN campaign flow

commercial_funds.name: MTDC-MicroLEAP Peer-to-Peer
commercial_funds.introduction: P2P financing programme enabling local technology companies to raise crowd-sourced financing via microLEAP.
basic_eligibility: Qualified to launch P2P campaign through microLEAP
commercial_funds.participation_amount: Up to 30% of fund to be raised or maximum RM500,000 per campaign
commercial_funds.application_hint: Pitch to MTDC / qualify through microLEAP campaign flow

commercial_funds.name: Aerospace and Electrical & Electronic Ecosystem Investment Fund (AEEEIF)
commercial_funds.introduction: Funding for high-growth technology-based aerospace manufacturing and MRO companies, with equity and interest subsidisation.
basic_eligibility: Relevant certification: AS9100D (Aerospace IAQG) and/or CAAM Part 145 (MRO)
Minimum 30% growth in human capital technical skills during tenure
Maintain minimum PBT margin of 5% throughout tenure
commercial_funds.funding_quantum: Up to RM10 million per company
